sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Besta guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Besta Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Besta
hero.summary: Both the basic and special scale from Max HP, which keeps HP sets ahead of pure defense stacking. From there, branch into the Bruiser tank route and the Fast utility route as your gear options widen.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Besta feels best once Speed, HP%, and DEF% are online, giving the first rotation a much steadier payoff.
bullets: Main stats stay on Speed necklace and HP% ring.
Substat focus: Speed, HP%, DEF%, and Effect RES.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Skill investment is cleanest as Ultimate >= Special >= Basic, with the first cooldown setting the pace for the full rotation.

steps.title: Open with Ultimate
steps.detail: Lead with the highest-invested cooldown so the opener starts on the strongest possible breakpoint.

steps.title: Cash in on Special
steps.detail: Special is usually the next meaningful breakpoint once the opener lands and should carry the mid-cycle payoff.

steps.title: Fill with Basic
steps.detail: Use Basic between cooldowns while you keep Speed and HP% stable on gear.

steps.title: Upgrade toward the final target
steps.detail: Budget target is 3 / 3 / 3, with 4 / 7 / 7 as the long-term skill finish.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Start on the Core line with HP (4pc) + Barrier (2pc) and Speed necklace and HP% ring. Move into the Bruiser tank route and the Fast utility route once the baseline is stable.

sets.label: Core
sets.note: Core keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

sets.label: Bruiser tank
sets.note: Bruiser tank keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

sets.label: Fast utility
sets.note: Fast utility keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

priorities: Substats: SPD, HP%, DEF%, Effect Res, Flat HP

targetStats.summary: Lock Speed necklace and HP% ring, then stack  through substats.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough priority: raise copies after the main skill breakpoints are online.
Substat focus: Speed, HP%, DEF%, and Effect RES

items.label: Passive
items.title: Faint Emotions
items.summary: Besta's passive matters more once the core stat line is online and the rotation is already stable.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Steadfast Lance
items.summary: Use the basic to bridge cooldowns; it should stay behind the two higher-impact skills in upgrade priority.

items.label: Special
items.title: Repel
items.summary: Special is the next major breakpoint after the opener and usually carries the mid-cycle payoff.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: Unstoppable Charge
items.summary: Ultimate anchors the opener and stays at the top of the investment order for this build.
